name: sass-analyzer
description: Fast SCSS language support: diagnostics, completions, go to definition, hover, rename, and more — powered by a hand-written Rust parser.

semanticTokenTypes.description: A Sass mixin declaration or @include reference.

sass-analyzer.trace.server.description: Traces the communication between VS Code and the sass-analyzer language server.

sass-analyzer.server.path.description: Override the path to the sass-lsp binary. Leave empty to use the bundled binary.

sass-analyzer.loadPaths.description: Additional directories to search for @use and @forward imports. Paths are relative to workspace root. Supports ${workspaceFolder}.

sass-analyzer.importAliases.description: Map of import alias prefixes to target directories (string or array of strings). Paths are relative to workspace root. Supports ${workspaceFolder}. For monorepos, use arrays to map one alias to different directories per project.

sass-analyzer.prependImports.description: Module paths to implicitly @use as * in every file (e.g. for Vite additionalData). Supports ${workspaceFolder}.
